properties.entry: We recommend using the Chrome browser.
The set content size can only be checked within the Groupware.
Click the image to upload the file.
Click the image to upload the file.
X-X out of the total X
ex) LG Uplus, Dacom, Powercom, integrated service, terminal, membership, customer center, etc.
Registration is not possible because required fields are not entered.
Do you want to delete the Department?
Use only letters (a-z), numbers, and period.
ID you entered can be used.
Only English small letters, numbers, and periods are allowed.

There is currently no remaining space for mail mail. Secure E-mail capacity. the added users do not the allocated capacity and cannot use mail. Do you want to proceed with adding users? # Mail capacity management menu: Administrator Setting> Capacity Setting> Mail Capacity Setting
Registration is not possible because required fields are not entered.
Please check the Password format. Mix 3 Types of English (large), English (small), numbers, and special characters (8-20 characters).
Mix 3 Types of English (large), English (small), numbers, and special characters (8-20 characters).
You cannot use more than 3 characters of the same character as your ID.
You cannot use more than 3 consecutive characters(123 or 321, abc, cba, etc.).
Password and Confirm Password not match.
Do you want to delete the user account?
You cannot delete the representative department.
Registration is not possible because required fields are not entered.
*You can adjust the order by dragging and dropping.
In use position cannot be deleted.
Do you want to delete the position?
Registration is not possible because required fields are not entered.
You can adjust the order by dragging and dropping.
In use job title cannot be deleted.
Do you want to delete the job title?
* Download the sample form file, fill out the form according to the form, and upload it. If the form is different, you cannot register.
* Please divide uploads by 20 people at a time.
[Cautions when filling out the sample form]
1) the columns marked with (*) are required, so Enter them.
2) the first row is recognized as the first row of each column in Excel. Enter actual attendance data from the second row.
3) Work code: Enter A for addition, U for correction, and D for deletion.

4) Password: It is required only when adding and is initially set as the value entered in Excel. When modifying, the Password is not changed. Please use the individual user edit menu to change the Password.
Make sure to create a Password by mixing 3 out of 4 English (large), English (small), numbers, and special characters.
3 or more times of the same character, 3 or more consecutive characters (123 or 321, abc, cba, etc.), and 3 or more characters identical to the ID cannot be used.
5) Paid/Free Category: Y Free User / N Paid User (Enter Y only when using messenger only.)
6) Employee Type: I internal employees / e external cooperative employees

7) Employee identification number: When you register an employee in "Human Resources> Employee Information> Employee Registration tab", you must enter the employee identification number to get Groupware user Information.
Reason: No matching department was found.
Departments and users of the organization chart can be exported to an Excel file.
The maximum size of 1 attach capacity
The WebDisk can be up to 1000MB.
Enter the phone number in the personal Information.
Do you want to recover the account?
A completely deleted account cannot be recovered. Do you want to delete?
Do you want to change the default Capacity?
It cannot be allocated because it exceeds the total capacity.
Caution : When changing, the default capacity is allocated to all users.
Do you want to change the allocated capacity?
The allocated capacity of the user you selected is changed to the default capacity. Do you want to remove it?
User changed to the default capacity user.
Mail Data Usage by deleted user
All mails of the selected user are deleted and the deleted capacity is immediately reflected. Do you want to delete?
All data of the user deleted.
Do you want to change the default number of SMS?
Entered number exceeds total number. Set again.
Caution : When changing, the default number of SMS is allocated to all users.
Do you want to change the allocated number of SMS?
The allocated number of SMS you selected is changed to the default number of SMS. Do you want to remove it?
X-X out of the total X
The Representative Mail Name not entered.
The Representative Mail Address not been entered.
Do you want to delete the Representative Mail Address("mail address")?
You cannot add more than the number of POP3 licenses.
Mix 3 Types of English (large), English (small), numbers, and special characters (8-20 characters).
ID you entered can be used.
Password and Confirm Password not match.
If you stop it, selected user cannot send or receive e-mails. Do you want to stop the POP3 account?
Do you want to recover the POP3 account?
If POP3 account is deleted, it cannot be recovered.
Do you want to delete POP3 account forever?
When set, not set users cannot use the domain.
It can be applied again at a later reset.
Do you want to set it?
When canceled, All user use the domain.
It can be applied again at a later reset.
Do you want to set it?
* This is a function to specify the sending mail domain for each user when using multiple mail domains in the company.
Do you want to delete the domain?
Do you want to save the form classification?
Do you want to modify the form classification?
(If you select'Use', all forms included in the Form Classification are also modified to'Use'.)
Do you want to delete the form classification?
ex) the Management Application-XXXX / When drafting, the document number is +1 than the current serial number and is numbered.
Form can only be used if the Form Classificaion is set to 'Use'. If you set 'not', this form cannot be used in the mobile app.
Form can only be used if the Form Classificaion is set to 'Use'.
* Macro is only usable when Namo Editor is selected in 'Common> Groupware Setting> Screen Setting'.
(*If you select the tag below while placing the cursor in the form, the data will be entered into the form when drafting.)
Register the approval path that will be applied by default when drafting with this form.
If you click the department/Administrator, it will be added to the Approval Path.
Do you want to designate the approval path?
Do you want to save the form?
Do you want to modify the Form?
Do you want to delete the form?
ex) the Management Application-XXXX / When drafting, the document number is +1 than the current serial number and is numbered.
Do you want to modify the settings?
After opening the Form registered in the Groupware, you can edit it into the company's Official Document form, then save and use it.
When you open the Form, the content of the editor below changes to the opened Form.
1. the company logo and seal (company seal) image are displayed as Information at the time the Form was saved. When changing the company logo or seal, please use the form after modifying it.
2. the phrases between the exclamation marks (!) are automatically replaced when the completed Official Document is executed.
Do you want to modify the Official Document Form?
Do you want to stop writing?
Drafted Documents with no change of owner
Including Documents of other Users owned by the drafter
Select the User to be transferred.
Do you want to transfer the document?
Entered name is already in use.
Do you want to save the macro?
Do you want to modify the macro?
Do you want to delete the macro?
Do you want to delete the viewer?
Select the Board / Board box to add / modify and delete
Registration is not possible because required fields are not entered.
Do you want to delete the board? All posts in the Board will be deleted.
Registration is not possible because required fields are not entered.
Do you want to delete the board box? the board box and sub-board will be deleted together.
Do you want to modify the Business form type?
It cannot be deleted because there is the form already used in the selected form type.
Do you want to delete the business form type?
Do you want to modify the business form?
Do you want to delete the business form?
Select the Business box to add / modify and delete.
Entered Business box Name is already exists.
Do you want to delete the business box?
Select the Calendar to add / modify and delete.
Do you want to delete the calendar?
Please note that if the Clock in/out time changes,
the statistical data of the Attendance Setting may change.
#This is a required setting for calculating the standard work times. (Work Group targets are calculated separately)
Groups with different clock in/out time
can be set for shift work
Step 1: Set time limit for overtime work
If a specific user has to work for more than 12 hours per week, a check option is displayed on the overtime screen, and when chekced, it is possible to apply for more than 12 hours.
When requesting for overtime approval, Set whether or not to allow exceeding 12 hours per week.
Step 2: Set the time for requesting for overtime work
When setting overtime and night work times, users can request only in the set time.
In case of early clock in and late clock out, it is calculated based on the set clock in/out time (based on work group time).
When the user is late, work times are calculated based on the set clock in time.
(For users registered in the work group,
the time set in the work group is applied)
Based on actual clock in/out hours and requested overtime hours,
When work times exceed 40 hours per week, a notification will be sent.
When work times exceed 52 hours per week, a notification will be sent.
Only those who have been hired for less than one year will be automatically calculated.
Automatic calculation of basic yearly vacation data for next year
It is allowed to use even if there is no remaining vacation, and it is marked as a minus.
Only one employee can be saved.
Add: Only yearly vacation / Use: First use monthly vacation, and if there is no monthly vacation, use yearly vacation
The period and the number of yearly vacation are not linked, and the number of yearly vacation is entered and used by the administrator.
Do you want to stop writing?, Do you want to leave the site when moving to another menu?
X-X out of the total X
X-X out of the total X
The entered hours will be excluded from work times.
Registration is not possible because required fields are not entered.
Break time exceeds the work times. Correct the break time.
X-X out of the total X
The Work Gruop will be delete forever. Do you want to delete the Work Group?
Open the downloaded file, log in with the groupware e-mail, and after completing the setup, linking is possible.
You must download the sample, fill in the form, and upload it to register the CAPS ID normally.
U+ work time attendance linkage function is applied first.
(Only one can be selected from U + work time / ADT CAPS / S1 SECOM)
After entering the CAPS ID, Click the save button.
Entered "CAPS ID" is already in use.
X-X out of the total X
Open the downloaded file, log in with the groupware e-mail, and after completing the setup, linking is possible.
You must download the sample, fill in the form, and upload it to register the SECOM ID normally.
U+ work time attendance linkage function is applied first.
(Only one can be selected from U + work time / ADT CAPS / S1 SECOM)
After entering the SECOM ID, Click the save button.
Entered "SECOM ID" is already in use.
X-X out of the total X
Select the Address book to add / modify and delete.
All contact address in the Address book will be deleted. Do you want to delete the Address book?
Step1. Select the owner of the address book to be transferred.
Step2. Select the address book to be transferred.
Owner's Address book(Select the address book to transfer.)
Step.3 Select the recipient to be transferred
Do you want to delete the category?
Do you want to delete the classification?
Do you want to delete the facility?
X-X out of the total X
Do you want to approve the work space opening?
Opening of the work space approved.
Registration is not possible because required fields are not entered.
Do you want to return the work space opening?
Opening of the work space returned.
Do you want to close the work space?
Enter the user name to search.
Do you want to change [XXX] as the main administrator?
You cannot transfer the Main Administrator authority to the Main Administrator.
Registration number of entrepreneur you entered is not registered with U+ERP. Please check again or contact the customer center.
If the entered registration number of entrepreneur is different, you can change it through [Modify Company Information] in the left Organization Setting menu> Organization chart Setting.
This function is available only to customers who are joined to U+ERP. When the [Connect] button is clicked, the usage number is automatically entered and linked with the Groupware service.
A new U+ERP disbursement document form is created. Change form characteristics such as document number in form Setting.
Form Setting: Administrator Setting> Service Setting> Approval> Form Setting> "ERP disbursement document (form)"
On the 1st of every month, you must scrape the usage History.
If you would like to connect U+ERP and Groupware, please contact the customer center (1544-2164).
This is a function for customers using U+ work time solution.
2. Click the icon at the upper right of the page
3. Enter the verified company code into the service code
There are X Ongoing Attendance requests. the linkage will be changed only after approval is completed.
* You must set the approval setting to Use and select the form.
How to set: Admin Page> Service Setting> Attendance> Function> Approval Setting > Select 'Use' for Vacation / No vacation / Overtime and select form > Save
If you select'Not', U+ work time and data linkage are not available.
Reflecting clock in/out list in the Attendance
Please link the U+ work time solution first.
If the clock in/out time of U+ work time is reflected, the details of other programs such as ADT CAPS and S1 SECOM are not reflected.
(Only one can be selected from U + work time / ADT CAPS / S1 SECOM)
For the absence type with 0.5 vacation days of use, the morning/afternoon selection is added. Specify AM/PM for the corresponding absence type.
How to set: Admin Setting> Service Setting> Attendance > Absence Type Setting> Select deduction day for 0.5 days> Click [Select Time] to select AM/PM> Save
If not set, 8 hours will be set for the work time solution.
When unlinked, the Webhard account created in Groupware is deleted.
If you want to use the Webhard service with the Webhard User Account created in Groupware, select Maintain ID.
Service Linkage failed. Please check the account Information and connect again.
It can be used after linking the Service.
When the user authority is deleted, the Webhard account created in Groupware
is deleted and cannot be restored.
Also, when an authority is granted later, the previously used ID
cannot be used, and can be used after creating a new ID.
Do you want to delete user authority?
- Create a webhard ID based on the groupware user information.
If it continues to fail, please contact customer service.
When unlinked, the Webfax account created in Groupware is deleted.
If you want to use the Webfax service with the Webfax User Account created in Groupware, select Maintain ID.
Service Linkage failed. Please check the account Information and connect again.
It can be used after linking the Service.
When the user authority is deleted, the Webfax account created in Groupware
is deleted and cannot be restored.
Also, when an authority is granted later, the previously used ID
cannot be used, and can be used after creating a new ID.
Do you want to delete user authority?
- Create a webfax ID based on the groupware user information.
If it continues to fail, please contact customer service.
When unlinked, the E-Document account created in Groupware is deleted.
If you want to use the E-Document service with the E-Document User Account created in Groupware, select Maintain ID.
Service Linkage failed. Please check the account Information and connect again.
It can be used after linking the Service.
When the user authority is deleted, the E-Document account created in Groupware
is deleted and cannot be restored.
Also, when an authority is granted later, the previously used ID
cannot be used, and can be used after creating a new ID.
Do you want to delete user authority?
- Create a E-Document ID based on the groupware user information.
If it continues to fail, please contact customer service.
